message:
test(conformance): add proptest round-trip properties for Feather, IPC, SQL, and Excel

Add rusqlite dev-dependency and arb_int64_dataframe strategy for
generating Int64-only DataFrames. Add 10 new property tests across
four I/O formats:
- Feather (Arrow IPC): shape, column names, Int64 value preservation
- IPC stream: shape preservation
- SQL (SQLite): shape, values, column names with sorted comparison
- Excel: shape and Int64 value recovery from f64 storage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
